languages.text: "Повелевай ты плотью в самом деле, досточтимый коллега, ты воспроизвел бы единого себя, а не множество неполноценных дубликатов". {n}Неприкрытое злое торжество звучит в словах манипулуса.{/n}

"Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Повелевай ты плотью в самом деле, досточтимый коллега, ты воспроизвел бы единого себя, а не множество неполноценных дубликатов". {n}Неприкрытое злое торжество звучит в словах манипулуса.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Had you truly commanded the flesh, venerable colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

"Had you truly commanded the flesh, venerable colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

"Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

"Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

languages.text: «Si de verdad fueras un maestro de la carne, mi estimado colega, habrías reproducido un único individuo y no numerosas copias defectuosas». {n}Las palabras del manipulus están llenas de un triunfo malicioso.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Si de verdad fueras un maestro de la carne, mi estimado colega, habrías reproducido un único individuo y no numerosas copias defectuosas». {n}Las palabras del manipulus están llenas de un triunfo malicioso.{/n}

languages.text: “若你真是血肉领域的大师，尊敬的同僚，那你早就该复制出唯一的完美自我，而非一大堆有缺陷的复制品了。”{n}操纵者的话语中流露出不加掩饰的恶毒而得意的胜利感。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “若你真是血肉领域的大师，尊敬的同僚，那你早就该复制出唯一的完美自我，而非一大堆有缺陷的复制品了。”{n}操纵者的话语中流露出不加掩饰的恶毒而得意的胜利感。{/n}

languages.text: "Wärt Ihr wirklich ein Meister des Fleisches, geschätzter Kollege, hättet Ihr ein einzelnes Selbst reproduziert, nicht eine Vielzahl fehlerhafter Duplikate." {n}Die Worte des Manipulus sind von einem unverblümten, boshaften Triumph erfüllt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wärt Ihr wirklich ein Meister des Fleisches, geschätzter Kollege, hättet Ihr ein einzelnes Selbst reproduziert, nicht eine Vielzahl fehlerhafter Duplikate." {n}Die Worte des Manipulus sind von einem unverblümten, boshaften Triumph erfüllt.{/n}

languages.text: « Si vous étiez vraiment un maître de la chair, estimé collègue, vous vous seriez contenté de produire une seule et unique copie parfaite, et non pas une myriade de clones contrefaits. » {n}Un air de triomphe ouvertement malveillant suinte à travers les propos du manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Si vous étiez vraiment un maître de la chair, estimé collègue, vous vous seriez contenté de produire une seule et unique copie parfaite, et non pas une myriade de clones contrefaits. » {n}Un air de triomphe ouvertement malveillant suinte à travers les propos du manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: "Eğer gerçekten etin efendisi olsaydınız saygıdeğer meslektaşım, çok sayıda kusurlu kopya yerine tek bir benlik üretirdiniz." {n}Manipülus'un sözlerinde gizlenmemiş, kötücül bir zafer tınısı duyuluyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Eğer gerçekten etin efendisi olsaydınız saygıdeğer meslektaşım, çok sayıda kusurlu kopya yerine tek bir benlik üretirdiniz." {n}Manipülus'un sözlerinde gizlenmemiş, kötücül bir zafer tınısı duyuluyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「もしあなたが本当に肉体の達人なら、尊敬する同僚、あなたは欠陥だらけの多数の複製ではなく、単一の自分自身を再現していたでしょう。」{n}マニピュラスの言葉には、悪意に満ちた勝利の音が響く。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Were you truly a master of the flesh, esteemed colleague, you would have reproduced a single self, rather than a multitude of flawed duplicates." {n}Unveiled, malicious triumph rings in the Manipulus's words.{/n}
